parameters.subject: =Your Retainer Agreement from Richards & Law – {{ $('Update with all the approved variables').item.json.accident_date }}
=Your Retainer Agreement from Richards & Law – {{ $('Update with all the approved variables').item.json.accident_date }}

parameters.content:
## 📋 Workflow Overview

**📥 Webhook Entry Point**
Paralegal dashboard sends a POST request here with all extracted case fields. The Approved? node then routes the flow — approved submissions continue through the automation, rejected ones are logged in Google Sheets and stopped immediately.

**📋 Variable Extraction & Logging**
All approved form fields are extracted and mapped into clean variables. The workflow looks up the Clio Contact by email to retrieve their ID, then logs everything into the Google Sheets KPI tracker for a full audit trail.

**📅 Matter Lookup & SOL Calendar**
Finds the existing Clio Matter linked to this contact. Creates an all-day calendar event on the Responsible Attorney's calendar for the Statute of Limitations deadline — automatically set 8 years from the accident date.

**🔧 Dynamic Custom Field Mapping**
Fetches all Clio custom field definitions and existing Matter field value IDs, then joins them into a single lookup map so any field can be updated dynamically — no hardcoded IDs needed.

**🧠 Pronouns & Injury Paragraph**
Computes 3 fields based on extracted data: his/her and he/she based on client gender, and a full injury paragraph — property-damage-only text if no injuries were reported, bodily injury text if injuries were recorded. These populate directly inside the Retainer Agreement template.

**📝 Clio Matter Update**
PATCHes all case data to the existing Matter: accident date, location, description, defendant, plate number, vehicle, gender, injury count, SOL date, pronouns, and injury paragraph. PATCH is used instead of POST to avoid creating duplicate records.

**🔗 Seasonal Booking Link**
Checks the current month in New York timezone and selects the correct consultation link — in-office from March to August, virtual from September to February.

**📄 Retainer Agreement Generation**
Triggers Clio's document automation API using the Matter ID and template ID. A fully pre-filled Retainer Agreement PDF is generated inside Clio. A wait node pauses execution to prevent fetching the document before it is ready.

**📎 Document Retrieval**
Fetches the most recently generated document from the Matter and checks that it actually exists before proceeding. If not ready, the workflow loops back and waits. The client email is then retrieved from Google Sheets and deduplicated to ensure only one email is ever sent per case.

**📧 Client Email Delivery**
Downloads the Retainer Agreement PDF from Clio and attaches it to a personalized HTML email sent via Gmail. The email includes the accident summary and a seasonal Calendly booking link. The case is then marked as Completed in the KPI tracker.

## ⚠️ Error Handling
If any node in this workflow fails, the error is automatically caught and forwarded to the Error Logger workflow. It logs the failure details into Google Sheets, where the KPI tracker dashboard displays the live error count.
